name: Ubiquiti UniFi AC Pro
title: Ubiquiti UniFi AC Pro
short_description: Indoor / Outdoor AP 2.4GHz (450Mbps) & 5GHz (1300Mbps), with coverage 140 m², 2xGLAN, 802.11ac
description: Indoor / Outdoor AP 2.4GHz (450Mbps) & 5GHz (1300Mbps), with coverage 140 m², 2xGLAN, 802.11ac

detailed_description.heading: Made for High-Density Environments
detailed_description.text: Elevate your connectivity with the UniFi AC Pro, an exquisitely engineered access point designed to meet the advanced demands of high-performance wireless networking. Featuring a meticulously crafted antenna with a gain of up to 3 dBi, the UniFi AC Pro offers optimal coverage and a balanced range, making it ideal for both ceiling and wall installations. This versatile unit is equipped with a powerful 20 dBi gain radio module, tailored to maximize signal transmission and reception in compliance with regional regulatory standards.

detailed_description.heading: Performance and Hardware
detailed_description.text: Incorporating 3x3 MIMO technology, the UniFi AC Pro delivers exceptional speeds of up to 450 Mbps in the 2.4 GHz band and an impressive 1300 Mbps at 5 GHz. This dual-band capability not only facilitates seamless operation across both frequency bands but also ensures broad compatibility with a wide range of devices, from modern smartphones to legacy computers, enhancing connection reliability and throughput, especially in environments with high user density. The UniFi AC Pro is constructed to provide enhanced connectivity, supporting high bandwidth applications without performance degradation. Its dual-band technology optimizes the wireless experience by intelligently balancing network traffic between the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands, adapting to varying proximity and environmental conditions. This makes it an ideal solution for a multitude of settings, including residential and commercial networks, educational institutions, hospitality venues, and healthcare facilities, where dependable and robust wireless access is crucial.

detailed_description.heading: Connectivity and PoE Features
detailed_description.text: Featuring two gigabit Ethernet ports with Power over Ethernet (PoE+) support, the access point facilitates high-speed data transfer and efficient power delivery over a single cable, enhancing installation flexibility and reducing complexity. Further enhancing its utility, an integrated USB connector allows for advanced functionalities such as packet transmission, connection to other access points, or attaching external storage for network configurations and data management. These features make the access point an invaluable asset in high-density environments like corporate settings, public venues, or educational institutions, where multiple users simultaneously connect to the network.

detailed_description.heading: Extensive Coverage Capability
detailed_description.text: The access point, with its substantial coverage area of 140 m² (1,500 ft²), supports connectivity for over 250 devices, positioning it as a superior choice for scalable enterprise Wi-Fi management. This device is particularly suitable for medium-sized spaces such as conference rooms, small offices, or dining areas, ensuring robust coverage without significant dead zones.

detailed_description.heading: Optimal RF Performance
detailed_description.text: This access point is designed to deliver outstanding RF performance, harnessing the capabilities of spectral analysis, airtime fairness, and band steering to optimize wireless communication efficiency and effectiveness. By incorporating advanced spectral analysis, the device meticulously examines the distribution of power across frequency components, identifying and mitigating interference from various sources, such as household appliances or other Wi-Fi networks. This precise analysis allows network administrators to select the least congested channels and adjust channel widths, thereby enhancing the network's performance by reducing interference and maximizing spectral efficiency. Furthermore, the access point employs airtime fairness to ensure equitable distribution of transmission opportunities among all connected devices, regardless of their individual specifications. This is crucial in mixed-device environments where legacy devices could potentially dominate the airtime, adversely affecting overall network throughput. Band steering technology is another pivotal feature of this access point, designed to alleviate network congestion by intelligently directing dual-band devices to the less crowded and faster 5 GHz band. This not only optimizes the use of available RF spectrum but also enhances the network's capacity and reduces latency by effectively balancing the load between the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands.

detailed_description.heading: UniFi Network Application Integration
detailed_description.text: Integrated with the UniFi Network Application, this access point forms part of a robust enterprise wireless management system, ideal for environments requiring high-density client deployments. Through the UniFi Network Application, network administrators can efficiently manage multiple networks from a unified interface, streamlining the configuration and monitoring of network devices across various locations. This centralized platform offers real-time network performance insights, enabling administrators to apply configuration changes to multiple networks simultaneously, thereby enhancing operational efficiency. The application also excels in managing network users and guests, providing tools to create and manage user groups with specific access rights and custom guest portals tailored for different needs. These features ensure appropriate access levels, significantly boosting network security. Additionally, the ability to remotely upgrade device firmware enhances device security and performance across the network by addressing vulnerabilities and updating features without manual intervention. Furthermore, the UniFi Network Application allows for the customization of guest hotspot design, architecture, and privacy settings. Administrators can personalize the login experience, set bandwidth limits, and integrate brand elements, creating a cohesive and controlled guest access environment. Advanced options such as voucher systems are also available to regulate and potentially monetize access. Enhanced privacy controls within the application help in managing data retention and user activity logs, ensuring compliance with privacy regulations. These features, along with the capability to segment network traffic and encrypt user data, bolster both security and privacy for users and guests alike. Adding to its versatility, the mobile app component of the UniFi Network Application facilitates quick device setup and on-the-go management, providing administrators with the flexibility to manage the network remotely. This integration is particularly beneficial in dynamic settings like hotels, educational institutions, offices, and retail spaces, where managing diverse user needs and maintaining stringent security protocols are paramount.

detailed_description.heading: Compare with similar products
detailed_description.text: The UniFi AC Pro is compared with UniFi AC In-Wall, UniFi AC Lite, UniFi AC Long Range, UniFi AC Mesh, and UniFi AC Mesh Pro across Wireless Standard, MIMO, Radio Rates, Antenna Gain, Range, Ethernet Ports, Power Consumption, and Environment.
